title: ALP board.yaml peripheral -> Zephyr subsystem Kconfig registry (metadata/registries/peripheral-kconfig.json) v1
description: Single source for mapping board.yaml `peripherals:` tokens to the Zephyr subsystem Kconfig symbols emitted into per-slice alp.conf files.  This is build-policy data, not silicon metadata: a token such as `uart` maps to Zephyr's `SERIAL` subsystem, while storage/network/USB tokens may enable a small bundle of Zephyr subsystems.
